core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss typographic precision with Fintech reliability.
Content is King: Data must be legible; whitespace is a feature, not a bug.
Zoom In: High-fidelity details on transaction cards.
hall_of_shame: No default Shadcn card styling (must customize shadows/borders).

rules: Transaction IDs and monetary figures in tables must use Manrope or JetBrains Mono.
H1 size: text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight.

usage.buttons: Primary Blue (#1E5EFF) for main actions. Ghost or Outline for secondary.
usage.backgrounds: Pure white (#FFFFFF) for cards. Subtle Slate (#F8FAFC) for app background.
usage.text: Slate-900 (#0F172A) for headings. Slate-600 (#475569) for body. NEVER use pure black.

landing_page.hero_style: Split Screen: Left Content, Right 3D/Abstract Visual.
landing_page.spacing: Generous. Section padding py-20 or py-24.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Fixed) + Scrollable Main Content Area.

cards.style: bg-white border border-border shadow-sm rounded-xl hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all duration-200 rounded-lg

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground bg-muted/50 font-medium

visual_enhancers.gradients: Subtle mesh gradients in hero background (Opacity 30%). No hard linear gradients.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly on sticky headers: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/20.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE CSS VARIABLES: Modify 'src/index.css' to use the specific colors defined in 'colors.palette'. Ensure --primary is 222 100% 56% (approx for #1E5EFF).
2. FONT SETUP: Add the Google Fonts import to 'src/index.css' immediately.
3. SHADCN OVERRIDES: When installing Shadcn components, ensure they use 'slate' as the base gray.
4. AUTH LAYOUT: Create a distinct 'AuthLayout' for Login/Signup that splits the screen: Left = Form, Right = Testimonial/Image (use 'trust_proof' image).
5. DASHBOARD LAYOUT: Create a 'DashboardLayout' with a Sidebar. Use 'NavLink' for active states.
6. TABLES: For the Transactions list, use a clean table component. Highlight 'Status' with colored badges (Green for Paid/Released, Yellow for Pending).
7. MOBILE: Ensure the Sidebar becomes a Sheet/Drawer on mobile.
8. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Add 'hover:scale-[1.02]' to cards and buttons. Add 'active:scale-95' to buttons.
9. TOASTS: Use 'sonner' for all success/error notifications (e.g., 'Transaction Created').

universal_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure color contrast ratios. Use semantic HTML.
universal_guidelines.code_style: Functional components, Hooks, Tailwind utility classes.
forbidden: No default blue link colors - use primary color.
